summary: The diff implements REQ-2 fully: a new AboutSection component is created and inserted immediately below HeroSection in LandingPage.tsx, with a 2-column layout, correct heading, descriptive text, 'View Memberships' CTA using TanStack Router Link to /membership, and side-by-side labeled images referencing the correct static asset paths. REQ-1 requires the actual image files to be generated and saved under frontend/public/assets/generated/, but no image files appear in the diff as added files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a historic 1902 black-and-white photo-style illustration and a current modern exterior photo-style illustration of McKinley Elementary School, saved as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no image files added. The added files list contains only 'frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx' and modified .tsx/.txt/.json files. The image files mckinley-1902.dim_600x400.png and mckinley-current.dim_600x400.png are referenced in the code but not present as added files in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: An eyebrow label paragraph reading 'Our Story' is added above the heading in the About section.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify any eyebrow label or 'Our Story' text — only the heading 'About Actuality Studio' and the specified descriptive text were requested for the left column.

hallucinated_features.description: A supporting detail paragraph about McKinley Elementary School history ('Rooted in the historic bones of McKinley Elementary School...') is added below the required descriptive text.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies exact left-column text. This additional paragraph was not part of the specified content.
